content: We insure private and commercial vehicles using petrol diesel hybrid EV or CNG. Vehicles older than 15 years are not eligible. Coverage duration is 1 to 5 years. Policy becomes active after first premium payment. Renewal allowed within 30 days. Transfer not allowed if there is active claim.

Only one claim can be processed at a time. FIR is mandatory for theft claims. Repair bill and invoice required for own damage. Depreciation ranges from 5 percent to 60 percent unless zero depreciation plan is active. Total loss occurs if damage exceeds 75 percent of vehicle value.

IDV is the current value of the vehicle after depreciation. Deductible is a fixed amount deducted from claim. Zero depreciation prevents depreciation deduction. Constructive total loss occurs when repair cost exceeds 75 percent of IDV.
